---
title: "Reflection"
---

## Overview
*Brief intro, this project and class*

## Key Learnings
### 1. Version Control (Git & GitHub)
* *learning Git, managing repositories, *

### 2. Static Site Generation (Quarto)
* *learning Quarto and YAML, structure of site.*

### 3. Python & Data Visualisation
* *embedding active Python code .*

## Challenges & Solutions
* **Challenge:** *spec technical hurdle *
* **Solution:** *explain solution .*

## Moving Forward & Application
* **Critical Self-Assessment:** *Reflect on overall performance -strengths, -improvements *
* **Beyond the Module:** *skills developed and app to future .*
